name: eve-agent-harness
description: Standalone workspace for building filesystem-first eve agents.

scripts.demo:analyst: pnpm --dir eve-analyst install && pnpm --dir eve-analyst dev
scripts.demo:support: pnpm --dir examples/support-agent install && pnpm --dir examples/support-agent dev
scripts.demo:research: pnpm --dir examples/research-agent install && pnpm --dir examples/research-agent dev
scripts.demo:ops: pnpm --dir examples/ops-agent install && pnpm --dir examples/ops-agent dev
scripts.demo:web-ui: pnpm --dir web-ui install && pnpm --dir web-ui dev
scripts.build:web-ui: pnpm --dir web-ui install && pnpm --dir web-ui build
